description.en: Can't be played or removed from your deck.
description.zh: 不能被打出或从你的牌组中移除。
description.en_plain: Can't be played or removed from your deck.
description.zh_plain: 不能被打出或从你的牌组中移除。

description.en: Towers gain an additional 0.33% critical strike chance for each point of luck you have.
description.zh: 你每拥有1点运气，防御塔就会提升0.33%的暴击率。
description.en_plain: Towers gain an additional 0.33% critical strike chance for each point of luck you have.
description.zh_plain: 你每拥有1点运气，防御塔就会提升0.33%的暴击率。

description.en: Wave start: If you don't have shields, gain 2 shield.
description.zh: 在回合开始时，如果你没有护盾，则获得2点护盾。
description.en_plain: Wave start: If you don't have shields, gain 2 shield.
description.zh_plain: 在回合开始时，如果你没有护盾，则获得2点护盾。

description.en: Transcend: Wave end: Restore 1 health.
description.zh: 超频。每一波次结束，恢复1点生命值。
description.en_plain: Transcend: Wave end: Restore 1 health.
description.zh_plain: 超频。每一波次结束，恢复1点生命值。

description.en: Wave end: Spawn a random non-basic tower if you have 7 or more cards in your hand.
description.zh: 如果你的手牌有7张或更多，在波次结束时产生一个随机的非基本塔。
description.en_plain: Wave end: Spawn a random non-basic tower if you have 7 or more cards in your hand.
description.zh_plain: 如果你的手牌有7张或更多，在波次结束时产生一个随机的非基本塔。

description.en: Towers cannot be deactivated. All towers can attack cloaked enemies.
description.zh: 防御塔不会被停用。所有防御塔都可以攻击隐身的敌人。
description.en_plain: Towers cannot be deactivated. All towers can attack cloaked enemies.
description.zh_plain: 防御塔不会被停用。所有防御塔都可以攻击隐身的敌人。

description.en: Every time you play a tower from your hand, draw a card.
description.zh: 每当你从手牌中打出一个防御塔，抽一张牌。
description.en_plain: Every time you play a tower from your hand, draw a card.
description.zh_plain: 每当你从手牌中打出一个防御塔，抽一张牌。

description.en: Towers gain 3% fire rate for each time you have cycled through your deck this combat.
description.zh: 你每抽到一张本卡牌，所有防御塔提升3%攻击速度。
description.en_plain: Towers gain 3% fire rate for each time you have cycled through your deck this combat.
description.zh_plain: 你每抽到一张本卡牌，所有防御塔提升3%攻击速度。

description.en: Wave end: Gain 1 crystal for each 2 cards in your hand.
description.zh: 每一波次结束，你手中每有2张牌就获得1个水晶。
description.en_plain: Wave end: Gain 1 crystal for each 2 cards in your hand.
description.zh_plain: 每一波次结束，你手中每有2张牌就获得1个水晶。

description.en: All towers can now target cloaked enemies. Enemies lose 5% speed.
description.zh: 所有防御塔都可以攻击隐身的敌人。敌人全体减速5%。
description.en_plain: All towers can now target cloaked enemies. Enemies lose 5% speed.
description.zh_plain: 所有防御塔都可以攻击隐身的敌人。敌人全体减速5%。

description.en: Round start: Create two gray tiles on random free spots on the map. Convert two red tiles into gray tiles.
description.zh: 在每一轮开始时，在随机的自由位置上创建两个灰色地格，并将两个红色地格变成灰色。
description.en_plain: Round start: Create two gray tiles on random free spots on the map. Convert two red tiles into gray tiles.
description.zh_plain: 在每一轮开始时，在随机的自由位置上创建两个灰色地格，并将两个红色地格变成灰色。

description.en: Enemies that get teleported get stunned for 2.5 seconds.
description.zh: 被传送的敌人会被击晕2.5秒。
description.en_plain: Enemies that get teleported get stunned for 2.5 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 被传送的敌人会被击晕2.5秒。

description.en: You lose 25% less shield after each wave.
description.zh: 每一波之后失去的护盾量减少25%。
description.en_plain: You lose 25% less shield after each wave.
description.zh_plain: 每一波之后失去的护盾量减少25%。

description.en: Whenever you play a tower that costs 3 or more, gain 1 shield.
description.zh: 每次你打出一个3费或以上的塔时，获得1个护盾。
description.en_plain: Whenever you play a tower that costs 3 or more, gain 1 shield.
description.zh_plain: 每次你打出一个3费或以上的塔时，获得1个护盾。

description.en: Increase your maximum spell mana by 2 for the rest of this combat.
description.zh: 在这场战斗的剩余时间里，你的最大法术法力值增加2。
description.en_plain: Increase your maximum spell mana by 2 for the rest of this combat.
description.zh_plain: 在这场战斗的剩余时间里，你的最大法术法力值增加2。

description.en: Each wave, all towers have a 25% chance of being deactivated, down to 2.5% at level 3. Gain 1 extra mana every round.
description.zh: 每一波，塔有25%的机会停用，3级时降至2.5%。 每轮获得1个额外的法力值。
description.en_plain: Each wave, all towers have a 25% chance of being deactivated, down to 2.5% at level 3. Gain 1 extra mana every round.
description.zh_plain: 每一波，塔有25%的机会停用，3级时降至2.5%。 每轮获得1个额外的法力值。

description.en: All towers have an extra 12% chance of dealing critical strikes.
description.zh: 塔楼有额外的12%的关键命中机会。
description.en_plain: All towers have an extra 12% chance of dealing critical strikes.
description.zh_plain: 塔楼有额外的12%的关键命中机会。

description.en: Wave Start: Return a random tower or spell in your Dispel pile to your hand.
description.zh: 波浪起始： 将你驱散堆中的一座随机防御塔或咒语放回你的手牌。
description.en_plain: Wave Start: Return a random tower or spell in your Dispel pile to your hand.
description.zh_plain: 波浪起始： 将你驱散堆中的一座随机防御塔或咒语放回你的手牌。

description.en: Wave start: Restore 1 health if you have less than 50% health.
description.zh: 在每一波开始时，如果你的健康总量低于50%，则恢复1个生命值。
description.en_plain: Wave start: Restore 1 health if you have less than 50% health.
description.zh_plain: 在每一波开始时，如果你的健康总量低于50%，则恢复1个生命值。

description.en:
Towers cannot be deactivated.
Reduce the overload threshold by 1.
description.zh: 塔楼不能被停用。过载阈值降低了1。
description.en_plain:
Towers cannot be deactivated.
Reduce the overload threshold by 1.
description.zh_plain: 塔楼不能被停用。过载阈值降低了1。

description.en: Draw 1 more card each round.
description.zh: 每轮额外多抽一张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw 1 more card each round.
description.zh_plain: 每轮额外多抽一张牌。

description.en:
Round start: Convert 2 Gray or Yellow tiles into Red tiles.
Red and Crimson Eye tiles give +20% fire rate and range.
description.zh: 回合开始： 将 2 张灰色或黄色牌转化为红色牌。红色和绯红之眼牌会带来 +20% 的属性加成。
description.en_plain:
Round start: Convert 2 Gray or Yellow tiles into Red tiles.
Red and Crimson Eye tiles give +20% fire rate and range.
description.zh_plain: 回合开始： 将 2 张灰色或黄色牌转化为红色牌。红色和绯红之眼牌会带来 +20% 的属性加成。

description.en: Round start: Add a random card to your hand. It costs 1 less this combat.
description.zh: 在每个回合开始时，将一张随机的牌加入你的手牌。它的成本是1减去这次战斗。
description.en_plain: Round start: Add a random card to your hand. It costs 1 less this combat.
description.zh_plain: 在每个回合开始时，将一张随机的牌加入你的手牌。它的成本是1减去这次战斗。

description.en: Spells cost 1 less, down to a minimum of 1.
description.zh: 法术费用减少1，最低降至1。
description.en_plain: Spells cost 1 less, down to a minimum of 1.
description.zh_plain: 法术费用减少1，最低降至1。

description.en:
All tower cards gain Rebound.
Towers gain +5% range.
description.zh: 所有塔牌获得反弹效果。防御塔获得 +5% 射程。
description.en_plain:
All tower cards gain Rebound.
Towers gain +5% range.
description.zh_plain: 所有塔牌获得反弹效果。防御塔获得 +5% 射程。

description.en: Round start: Level up a random level 1 tower that costs zero mana by default.
description.zh: 在每个回合开始时，随机选择一个默认0费的一级防御塔，将其升级。
description.en_plain: Round start: Level up a random level 1 tower that costs zero mana by default.
description.zh_plain: 在每个回合开始时，随机选择一个默认0费的一级防御塔，将其升级。

description.en:
On play: Convert all tiles to yellow tiles.
Yellow tiles give +8% stats. Enemies move 8% slower.
description.zh: 将所有方格变成黄色。黄色方块提供+8%的状态。敌人的移动速度降低8%。
description.en_plain:
On play: Convert all tiles to yellow tiles.
Yellow tiles give +8% stats. Enemies move 8% slower.
description.zh_plain: 将所有方格变成黄色。黄色方块提供+8%的状态。敌人的移动速度降低8%。

description.en: Round start: Summon a random tower.
description.zh: 在每个回合开始时，召唤一个随机防御塔。
description.en_plain: Round start: Summon a random tower.
description.zh_plain: 在每个回合开始时，召唤一个随机防御塔。

description.en: Restore 5 health. During the rest of the combat, ignore all enemy resistances. Martyr.
description.zh: 恢复5点生命值。在剩下的战斗中，无视所有敌人的抗性。殉道者。
description.en_plain: Restore 5 health. During the rest of the combat, ignore all enemy resistances. Martyr.
description.zh_plain: 恢复5点生命值。在剩下的战斗中，无视所有敌人的抗性。殉道者。

description.en:
Draw cards until you have 3 cards in hand.
Dispel.
description.zh:
抽牌直到你有3张手牌。
消耗。
description.en_plain:
Draw cards until you have 3 cards in hand.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain:
抽牌直到你有3张手牌。
消耗。

description.en:
Add a random card to your hand.
Transcend: Draw 3 cards instead.
description.zh:
将一张随机牌加入你的手牌。
超越：抽3张牌代替。
description.en_plain:
Add a random card to your hand.
Transcend: Draw 3 cards instead.
description.zh_plain:
将一张随机牌加入你的手牌。
超越：抽3张牌代替。

description.en: Rebound. Deal 10% of enemy max health as magic damage for each spell you cast this wave.
description.zh: 反弹。每施放一次魔法，都会造成敌人最大生命值 10%的魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Rebound. Deal 10% of enemy max health as magic damage for each spell you cast this wave.
description.zh_plain: 反弹。每施放一次魔法，都会造成敌人最大生命值 10%的魔法伤害。

description.en: Destroy level 1 enemies. Restore 1 health for each enemy destroyed this way.
description.zh: 摧毁等级为1的敌人。每消灭一个敌人，就恢复1点生命值。
description.en_plain: Destroy level 1 enemies. Restore 1 health for each enemy destroyed this way.
description.zh_plain: 摧毁等级为1的敌人。每消灭一个敌人，就恢复1点生命值。

description.en: Activate all deactivated towers in an area. Draw 1 more card next round.
description.zh: 激活一片区域内所有停用的防御塔。下一回合额外抽一张牌。
description.en_plain: Activate all deactivated towers in an area. Draw 1 more card next round.
description.zh_plain: 激活一片区域内所有停用的防御塔。下一回合额外抽一张牌。

description.en: Slow targeted enemies for 4 seconds.
description.zh: 使敌人减速4秒。
description.en_plain: Slow targeted enemies for 4 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 使敌人减速4秒。

description.en:
If Overload is active, gain 1 mana.
Dispel.
description.zh: 如果 "过载 "处于激活状态，则抽出1张法力值。驱散。
description.en_plain:
If Overload is active, gain 1 mana.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 如果 "过载 "处于激活状态，则抽出1张法力值。驱散。

description.en: Draw 2 extra cards next round.
description.zh: 在下一回合开始时，抽2张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw 2 extra cards next round.
description.zh_plain: 在下一回合开始时，抽2张牌。

description.en: Deal ! magic damage. Increase the damage of all Rebound Shock cards by 10% this combat.
description.zh: 造成 ! 魔法伤害。在这场战斗中，所有反弹冲击牌的伤害增加10%。
description.en_plain: Deal ! magic damage. Increase the damage of all Rebound Shock cards by 10% this combat.
description.zh_plain: 造成 ! 魔法伤害。在这场战斗中，所有反弹冲击牌的伤害增加10%。

description.en: Destroy two random tiles on the map with no towers. Draw 2 cards.
description.zh: 摧毁地图上随机的两张空地格。抽2张牌。
description.en_plain: Destroy two random tiles on the map with no towers. Draw 2 cards.
description.zh_plain: 摧毁地图上随机的两张空地格。抽2张牌。

description.en: Deal 60 magic damage. Deal 180 true damage instead if the enemies have less than half health.
description.zh: 造成60点魔法伤害。如果敌人的生命值低于一半，则造成180的真实伤害。
description.en_plain: Deal 60 magic damage. Deal 180 true damage instead if the enemies have less than half health.
description.zh_plain: 造成60点魔法伤害。如果敌人的生命值低于一半，则造成180的真实伤害。

description.en:
The next enchantment you cast this round costs 2 less.
Dispel.
description.zh: 你本回合施放的下一个秘法的费用减少2。消耗。
description.en_plain:
The next enchantment you cast this round costs 2 less.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 你本回合施放的下一个秘法的费用减少2。消耗。

description.en:
Gain 2 mana. Lose 2 health and summon a boss modifier.
Dispel.
description.zh: 获得2个法力值。损失2个生命值，召唤一个BOSS级负面效果。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Gain 2 mana. Lose 2 health and summon a boss modifier.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 获得2个法力值。损失2个生命值，召唤一个BOSS级负面效果。消耗。

description.en: Stun for 1.5 seconds and deal 12% enemy max health magic damage.
description.zh: 眩晕1.5秒，并造成敌人最大生命值12%的魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Stun for 1.5 seconds and deal 12% enemy max health magic damage.
description.zh_plain: 眩晕1.5秒，并造成敌人最大生命值12%的魔法伤害。

description.en: Reset the attack cooldown of all towers.
description.zh: 为所有塔楼的下一次攻击做准备。
description.en_plain: Reset the attack cooldown of all towers.
description.zh_plain: 为所有塔楼的下一次攻击做准备。

description.en:
Dispel all the cards in your hand.
Dispel.
description.zh:
消耗你手中的所有牌。
消耗。
description.en_plain:
Dispel all the cards in your hand.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain:
消耗你手中的所有牌。
消耗。

description.en: Deal 350 + 20% max health physical damage. Convert two random empty gray/yellow tiles into Crimson Eye.
description.zh: 造成350+20%最大生命值的物理伤害。将两个随机的灰/黄色空地格转换成深红眼。
description.en_plain: Deal 350 + 20% max health physical damage. Convert two random empty gray/yellow tiles into Crimson Eye.
description.zh_plain: 造成350+20%最大生命值的物理伤害。将两个随机的灰/黄色空地格转换成深红眼。

description.en: Deal 40 true damage for each deployed tower. Disable all towers for 5 seconds.
description.zh: 对目标区域内敌人造成真实伤害，数值为场上的防御塔数量乘以40。使所有防御塔失效5秒。
description.en_plain: Deal 40 true damage for each deployed tower. Disable all towers for 5 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 对目标区域内敌人造成真实伤害，数值为场上的防御塔数量乘以40。使所有防御塔失效5秒。

description.en: Slow all enemies for 6 seconds.
description.zh: 使范围内所有敌人减速6秒。
description.en_plain: Slow all enemies for 6 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 使范围内所有敌人减速6秒。

description.en:
Gain 1 shield and draw 1 card.
Dispel.
description.zh:
获得1点护盾并抽1张牌。
消耗。
description.en_plain:
Gain 1 shield and draw 1 card.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain:
获得1点护盾并抽1张牌。
消耗。

description.en: Draw 2 cards.
description.zh: 抽2张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw 2 cards.
description.zh_plain: 抽2张牌。

description.en: Stun for 3 seconds and deal 12% max health magic damage to all enemies.
description.zh: 眩晕敌人3秒并造成12%最大生命值的魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Stun for 3 seconds and deal 12% max health magic damage to all enemies.
description.zh_plain: 眩晕敌人3秒并造成12%最大生命值的魔法伤害。

description.en:
Transform up to 7 random gray tiles into random tiles.
Draw a card.
description.zh: 将最多 7 块随机灰色牌转化为随机牌。抽一张牌。
description.en_plain:
Transform up to 7 random gray tiles into random tiles.
Draw a card.
description.zh_plain: 将最多 7 块随机灰色牌转化为随机牌。抽一张牌。

description.en: Deal 120 + 20% enemy missing health magic damage.
description.zh: 对敌人造成120+20%已损失生命值魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Deal 120 + 20% enemy missing health magic damage.
description.zh_plain: 对敌人造成120+20%已损失生命值魔法伤害。

description.en: Draw a card. If Overload is active, draw 5 cards instead.
description.zh: 抽一张牌。如果过载处于激活状态，则抽5张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw a card. If Overload is active, draw 5 cards instead.
description.zh_plain: 抽一张牌。如果过载处于激活状态，则抽5张牌。

description.en:
Draw a card.
If you received 5 or more damage this combat, restore 2 health and draw another card.
description.zh: 抽一张牌。如果你在本场战斗中受到 5 或更多伤害，恢复 2 健康值并再抽一张牌。
description.en_plain:
Draw a card.
If you received 5 or more damage this combat, restore 2 health and draw another card.
description.zh_plain: 抽一张牌。如果你在本场战斗中受到 5 或更多伤害，恢复 2 健康值并再抽一张牌。

description.en:
Restore all your spell mana.
Dispel.
description.zh: 恢复全部法术法力值。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Restore all your spell mana.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 恢复全部法术法力值。消耗。

description.en:
Transform 3 empty Gray or Red tiles into Utility Plug-In tiles.
Draw a card.
Dispel.
description.zh: 将 3 张灰色或红色空牌转化为实用牌。抽一张牌。驱散
description.en_plain:
Transform 3 empty Gray or Red tiles into Utility Plug-In tiles.
Draw a card.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 将 3 张灰色或红色空牌转化为实用牌。抽一张牌。驱散

description.en:
Draw 3 cards.
Dispel.
description.zh:
抽3张牌。
消耗。
description.en_plain:
Draw 3 cards.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain:
抽3张牌。
消耗。

description.en:
Deal 3 damage to yourself.
Restore 2 health.
Dispel.
description.zh: 对自己造成3点伤害。恢复2点生命值。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Deal 3 damage to yourself.
Restore 2 health.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 对自己造成3点伤害。恢复2点生命值。消耗。

description.en: Draw 5 cards. Lose 1 health.
description.zh: 抽5张牌。失去1点生命值。
description.en_plain: Draw 5 cards. Lose 1 health.
description.zh_plain: 抽5张牌。失去1点生命值。

description.en:
Draw 2 cards. Dispel.
Transcend: Also draw 2 extra cards next turn.
description.zh: 抽2张牌。驱散。超越：另外，下一回合再抽2张牌。
description.en_plain:
Draw 2 cards. Dispel.
Transcend: Also draw 2 extra cards next turn.
description.zh_plain: 抽2张牌。驱散。超越：另外，下一回合再抽2张牌。

description.en: Teleport back enemies and stun them for 1 second.
description.zh: 将敌人向出生点传送一段距离，并使他们眩晕1秒。
description.en_plain: Teleport back enemies and stun them for 1 second.
description.zh_plain: 将敌人向出生点传送一段距离，并使他们眩晕1秒。

description.en: Deal 200 true damage to targeted enemies. Restore 1 health.
description.zh: 对目标敌人造成200点真实伤害。恢复1个生命。
description.en_plain: Deal 200 true damage to targeted enemies. Restore 1 health.
description.zh_plain: 对目标敌人造成200点真实伤害。恢复1个生命。

description.en: Convert 4 random gray or yellow tiles into EMP shield tiles.
description.zh: 将4张随机的灰色或黄色地格转化为EMP盾地格。
description.en_plain: Convert 4 random gray or yellow tiles into EMP shield tiles.
description.zh_plain: 将4张随机的灰色或黄色地格转化为EMP盾地格。

description.en: Rebound. Slow enemies in an area. If this isn't the first spell that you cast this wave, stun them instead.
description.zh: 反弹。减速区域内的敌人。如果这不是你这波施放的第一个法术，则改为眩晕。
description.en_plain: Rebound. Slow enemies in an area. If this isn't the first spell that you cast this wave, stun them instead.
description.zh_plain: 反弹。减速区域内的敌人。如果这不是你这波施放的第一个法术，则改为眩晕。

description.en: Remove a random modifier. Dispel.
description.zh: 移除一个随机负面效果。消耗。
description.en_plain: Remove a random modifier. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 移除一个随机负面效果。消耗。

description.en: Deal 200 physical damage to targeted enemies. Deal 600 true damage instead to level 2 or lower enemies.
description.zh: 对目标敌人造成200点物理伤害。对2级或以下的敌人造成600点真实伤害。
description.en_plain: Deal 200 physical damage to targeted enemies. Deal 600 true damage instead to level 2 or lower enemies.
description.zh_plain: 对目标敌人造成200点物理伤害。对2级或以下的敌人造成600点真实伤害。

description.en:
Create 3 random towers in your hand. They cost 1 less for the whole combat.
Dispel.
description.zh: 在手中随机创建 3 个防御塔。它们在整场战斗中的消耗减少 1。驱散
description.en_plain:
Create 3 random towers in your hand. They cost 1 less for the whole combat.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 在手中随机创建 3 个防御塔。它们在整场战斗中的消耗减少 1。驱散

description.en: Destroy a random enemy of level 3 or less.
description.zh: 消灭一个随机的3级或以下的敌人。
description.en_plain: Destroy a random enemy of level 3 or less.
description.zh_plain: 消灭一个随机的3级或以下的敌人。

description.en: Draw 5 cards.
description.zh: 抽5张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw 5 cards.
description.zh_plain: 抽5张牌。

description.en: Discard your hand and draw that many cards plus one.
description.zh: 弃置你的手牌并抽出相同数量的牌加一张。
description.en_plain: Discard your hand and draw that many cards plus one.
description.zh_plain: 弃置你的手牌并抽出相同数量的牌加一张。

description.en:
Silence all enemies.
Draw a card.
description.zh: 沉默所有敌人。抽一张牌。
description.en_plain:
Silence all enemies.
Draw a card.
description.zh_plain: 沉默所有敌人。抽一张牌。

description.en:
Stun for 3 seconds and deal 200 magic damage in an area.
Restore 1 spell mana.
description.zh: 眩晕 3 秒并在一个区域内造成 200 魔法伤害。恢复 1 法术法力值。
description.en_plain:
Stun for 3 seconds and deal 200 magic damage in an area.
Restore 1 spell mana.
description.zh_plain: 眩晕 3 秒并在一个区域内造成 200 魔法伤害。恢复 1 法术法力值。

description.en:
Add to your hand a copy of each card in your hand.
Dispel.
description.zh: 将你手牌中每张牌的副本加入你的手牌。驱散。
description.en_plain:
Add to your hand a copy of each card in your hand.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 将你手牌中每张牌的副本加入你的手牌。驱散。

description.en: Deal 275 + 25% enemy current health physical damage.
description.zh: 对敌人造成275+25%当前生命值物理伤害。
description.en_plain: Deal 275 + 25% enemy current health physical damage.
description.zh_plain: 对敌人造成275+25%当前生命值物理伤害。

description.en:
Convert 8 random gray or red tiles into yellow tiles.
Draw a card.
description.zh: 将8张随机的灰色地格转换成黄色地格。抽一张牌。
description.en_plain:
Convert 8 random gray or red tiles into yellow tiles.
Draw a card.
description.zh_plain: 将8张随机的灰色地格转换成黄色地格。抽一张牌。

description.en: Targeted enemies lose 80% of their armor and magic resist.
description.zh: 永久降低一个区域内敌人的护甲和魔法抗性80%。
description.en_plain: Targeted enemies lose 80% of their armor and magic resist.
description.zh_plain: 永久降低一个区域内敌人的护甲和魔法抗性80%。

description.en:
Recast the last spell cast from your hand other than this one.
Dispel.
description.zh: 重新释放你手中最后施放的咒语。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Recast the last spell cast from your hand other than this one.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 重新释放你手中最后施放的咒语。消耗。

description.en: Summon 3 successive shockwaves that deal 75 physical damage and stun for 1.5s.
description.zh: 召唤三个连续的冲击波，造成75点物理伤害并眩晕1.5秒。
description.en_plain: Summon 3 successive shockwaves that deal 75 physical damage and stun for 1.5s.
description.zh_plain: 召唤三个连续的冲击波，造成75点物理伤害并眩晕1.5秒。

description.en: Spawn three sentries.
description.zh: 随机生成三个哨兵。
description.en_plain: Spawn three sentries.
description.zh_plain: 随机生成三个哨兵。

description.en: Level down all enemies in an area. If they are level 1, slow them instead.
description.zh: 降低区域内所有敌人的等级。如果敌人等级为 1 级，则将其减速。
description.en_plain: Level down all enemies in an area. If they are level 1, slow them instead.
description.zh_plain: 降低区域内所有敌人的等级。如果敌人等级为 1 级，则将其减速。

description.en: Summon a random non-basic tower.
description.zh: 召唤一个随机的非基础防御塔。
description.en_plain: Summon a random non-basic tower.
description.zh_plain: 召唤一个随机的非基础防御塔。

description.en: Stun all enemies for 5 seconds. Draw 3 extra cards next round. Gain 2 shield.
description.zh: 眩晕所有敌人5秒。在下一回合开始时额外抽3张牌。获得2点护盾。
description.en_plain: Stun all enemies for 5 seconds. Draw 3 extra cards next round. Gain 2 shield.
description.zh_plain: 眩晕所有敌人5秒。在下一回合开始时额外抽3张牌。获得2点护盾。

description.en:
Summon a level 1 copy of one of the lowest level towers on the field.
Dispel.
description.zh: 召唤场上一个最低等级的塔的副本。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Summon a level 1 copy of one of the lowest level towers on the field.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 召唤场上一个最低等级的塔的副本。消耗。

description.en:
Restore 3 health.
Dispel.
description.zh: 恢复3点生命值。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Restore 3 health.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 恢复3点生命值。消耗。

description.en:
Deal 3^X true damage to all enemies, where X is the amount of cards in your hand minus 1.
Dispel.
description.zh: 对所有敌人造成 3^X 真实伤害，其中 X 是你的手牌数量减 1。驱散。
description.en_plain:
Deal 3^X true damage to all enemies, where X is the amount of cards in your hand minus 1.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 对所有敌人造成 3^X 真实伤害，其中 X 是你的手牌数量减 1。驱散。

description.en: Strongly slow all enemies for 8 seconds.
description.zh: 强烈减缓所有敌人的速度，持续8秒。
description.en_plain: Strongly slow all enemies for 8 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 强烈减缓所有敌人的速度，持续8秒。

description.en:
Next wave now consists of only level 1 Rookies. Draw 1 card.
Dispel.
description.zh: 下一波将只由1级新秀组成。 抽一张牌。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Next wave now consists of only level 1 Rookies. Draw 1 card.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 下一波将只由1级新秀组成。 抽一张牌。消耗。

description.en:
Gain 2 shield.
Transcend: This card costs 1 less mana.
description.zh:
获得2点护盾。
超频：这张牌的法力值减少1。
description.en_plain:
Gain 2 shield.
Transcend: This card costs 1 less mana.
description.zh_plain:
获得2点护盾。
超频：这张牌的法力值减少1。

description.en: Gain 1 shield, and then summon a random tower with a mana cost closest to your shield amount.
description.zh: 获得1点护盾，然后召唤一个法力值与你的护盾值最接近的随机防御塔。
description.en_plain: Gain 1 shield, and then summon a random tower with a mana cost closest to your shield amount.
description.zh_plain: 获得1点护盾，然后召唤一个法力值与你的护盾值最接近的随机防御塔。

description.en:
Draw 3 cards and reduce their cost by 1 this combat.
Dispel.
description.zh: 在本场战斗中抽取 3 张牌，并减少 1 张牌的费用。驱散。
description.en_plain:
Draw 3 cards and reduce their cost by 1 this combat.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 在本场战斗中抽取 3 张牌，并减少 1 张牌的费用。驱散。

description.en: At the start of your next round, draw cards until your hand is full. Martyr.
description.zh: 在你下一回合开始时，抽牌直到你的手牌满为止。殉道者。
description.en_plain: At the start of your next round, draw cards until your hand is full. Martyr.
description.zh_plain: 在你下一回合开始时，抽牌直到你的手牌满为止。殉道者。

description.en: Add two random spells to your hand. They cost 2 less this combat.
description.zh: 将两个随机法术加入你的手牌。他们在这场战斗中的费用减少了2。
description.en_plain: Add two random spells to your hand. They cost 2 less this combat.
description.zh_plain: 将两个随机法术加入你的手牌。他们在这场战斗中的费用减少了2。

description.en: All towers have 100% chance to deal critical strikes this round.
description.zh: 塔楼本轮有100%的机会做出关键性的打击。
description.en_plain: All towers have 100% chance to deal critical strikes this round.
description.zh_plain: 塔楼本轮有100%的机会做出关键性的打击。

description.en: Stun all enemies for 8 seconds.
description.zh: 眩晕所有敌人，持续8秒。
description.en_plain: Stun all enemies for 8 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 眩晕所有敌人，持续8秒。

description.en: Gain 3 luck permanently. Dispel.
description.zh: 永久获得3点运气。消耗。
description.en_plain: Gain 3 luck permanently. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 永久获得3点运气。消耗。

description.en: Teleport back all enemies and stun them for 4 seconds.
description.zh: 将所有敌人向后传送并使其眩晕4秒。
description.en_plain: Teleport back all enemies and stun them for 4 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 将所有敌人向后传送并使其眩晕4秒。

description.en:
Kill all enemies.
Dispel.
description.zh: 杀死所有的敌人。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Kill all enemies.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 杀死所有的敌人。消耗。

description.en:
Add three random cards with Dispel to your hand. They cost 0 this combat.
Dispel.
description.zh: 将三张带有驱散功能的随机牌加入你的手牌。在这场战斗中，它们的成本为0。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Add three random cards with Dispel to your hand. They cost 0 this combat.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 将三张带有驱散功能的随机牌加入你的手牌。在这场战斗中，它们的成本为0。消耗。

description.en: Draw 2 cards. Gain 1 shield for each card in your hand.
description.zh: 抽2张牌。你每有一张手牌，获得1点护盾。
description.en_plain: Draw 2 cards. Gain 1 shield for each card in your hand.
description.zh_plain: 抽2张牌。你每有一张手牌，获得1点护盾。

description.en: Go back 1 wave. Dispel. Transcend: Go back 1 more wave.
description.zh: 倒退一回合。消耗。超频：额外倒退一回合。
description.en_plain: Go back 1 wave. Dispel. Transcend: Go back 1 more wave.
description.zh_plain: 倒退一回合。消耗。超频：额外倒退一回合。

description.en: Gain 5 shield. If you have 25 or more shield, level up three random towers.
description.zh: 获得 5 个护盾。如果您有 25 个或更多护盾，可随机提升 3 个防御塔的等级。
description.en_plain: Gain 5 shield. If you have 25 or more shield, level up three random towers.
description.zh_plain: 获得 5 个护盾。如果您有 25 个或更多护盾，可随机提升 3 个防御塔的等级。

description.en: Deal 50 physical damage for each damage taken this combat. Martyr.
description.zh: 造成物理伤害，数值为在这场战斗中自身受到伤害值乘以50。殉道者。
description.en_plain: Deal 50 physical damage for each damage taken this combat. Martyr.
description.zh_plain: 造成物理伤害，数值为在这场战斗中自身受到伤害值乘以50。殉道者。

description.en: Summon three random non-basic towers.
description.zh: 召唤三个随机的非基础防御塔。
description.en_plain: Summon three random non-basic towers.
description.zh_plain: 召唤三个随机的非基础防御塔。

description.en: Level up a random tower.
description.zh: 提升一座随机塔的等级。
description.en_plain: Level up a random tower.
description.zh_plain: 提升一座随机塔的等级。

description.en:
Gain 7 shield.
Dispel. Martyr.
Transcend: Also restore 7 health.
description.zh:
Gain 10 shield./n消耗. Martyr.
超频: 同时恢复10点生命值。
description.en_plain:
Gain 7 shield.
Dispel. Martyr.
Transcend: Also restore 7 health.
description.zh_plain:
Gain 10 shield./n消耗. Martyr.
超频: 同时恢复10点生命值。

description.en:
Restore all missing health.
Dispel.
description.zh: 恢复你所有的生命值。驱散。
description.en_plain:
Restore all missing health.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 恢复你所有的生命值。驱散。
